title: Hashi no Mukou
titleNative: 端ノ向フ
synopsis: There are old stories of children disappearing by the river's edge. This has haunted Otoha ever since her friend Jiro disappeared when she was seven years old and now she is back in her hometown covering the war between the government and the dissidents. When she gets separated from the squad, Otoha thinks someone seems to be leading her deeper into the back alleys of the town.

title: Kishin Douji Zenki Gaiden: Anki Kitan
titleRomaji: Kishin Douji Zenki Gaiden: Anki Kitan
titleNative: 鬼神童子ＺＥＮＫＩ外伝　黯鬼奇譚
synopsis: In Kanoesaru village every 60 years mysterious murders happen. Every time seven 17 year old girls are killed. The villagers believe it is the work of a demon who once saved the village so they keep quiet about it. However the current head of the Ibuki family calls an exorcist to save her 2 daughters. What is the truth behind the murders in Kanoesaru village? (Source: AniDB)

title: Youkai Watch: Youkai Gakuen Y - Neko wa HERO ni Nareru ka
titleRomaji: Youkai Watch: Youkai Gakuen Y - Neko wa HERO ni Nareru ka
titleNative: 映画 妖怪ウォッチ 妖怪学園Ｙ 猫はHEROになれるか
synonyms: Yo-kai Watch Jam The Movie: Yo-kai Academy Y - Can a Cat be a Hero?
synopsis: Set in Y-Academy, an elite school that only allows students with top class abilities to enter. The protagonist, Jiba Jinpei, and his unique friends take on the mysteries of the school as transforming heroes. (Source: Yokai Watch Wiki)

tags.name: Youkai
tags.description: Prominently features supernatural creatures from Japanese folklore.

tags.name: Henshin
tags.description: Prominently features character or costume transformations which often grant special abilities.

title: Destiny Child
titleNative: デスティニーチャイルド
synopsis: The devil king Lucifero suddenly declares he's going to retire, and must choose a successor. The Devil King Cadets gather one after another, and go to the human world to participate in the succession contest. But only the devil king's own descendant Osamu has no interest whatsoever in the contest. Compared to the fate of the world, Osamu is more interested in his part-time job at a convenience store. Osamu has no choice, however, but to start collecting familiars called "Child," which are born from human souls. Osamu still only has an interest in his part-time job, and he's a few steps behind the rest of the Cadets.

tags.name: Demons
tags.description: Prominently features malevolent otherworldly creatures.

title: Kacchikenee!
titleNative: かっちけねぇ！
synopsis: Aiko lives in a shrine that has a sliding door that mysteriously is only half painted, and thought during her childhood that she wanted to paint it. But the 17-year old Aiko now has no dreams about the future. Suddenly, a strange man appears before her. Aiko's grandfather and the shrine's chief priest offers the man to stay in the shrine, but Aiko isn't having any of it. But he realizes the kindness of the brusque young man, and slowly comes to like him. But what is his true identity? (Source: Anime News Network) Kacchikenee! is one of four Anime Tamago 2016 young animator training projects.

title: Mokke Special Episodes
titleNative: もっけ
synopsis: Mokke Special Episodes: 1. Toorikaze (Passing Wind) 2. Mitsua Shigaeru

title: Nekogami Yaoyorozu Specials
titleNative: 猫神やおよろず
synopsis: Short episodes included in the Nekogami Yoayorozu Blu-ray and DVD volumes.

tags.name: Seinen
tags.description: Target demographic is adult males.

title: Ashiaraiyashiki no Juunin-tachi
titleNative: 足洗邸の住人たち。
synopsis: More than twenty years ago, an evil summoner committed "Great Summon". One third of human beings were killed, and devils and monsters invaded the Earth. One day, a painter, Tamura Fukutaro, moves into an apartment house called "Ashiaraiyashiki" and gets involved in the troubles of his non-human neighbors. It's the beginning of a severe battle among gods, devils and the ruler "The Central".

title: Takarajima Memorial: Yuunagi to Yobareta Otoko
titleRomaji: Takarajima Memorial: Yuunagi to Yobareta Otoko
titleNative: 宝島メモリアル「夕凪と呼ばれた男」
synopsis: A short story during Jim's adventure at sea. He encounters a man at a bar who told a tail about a one-legged man. Thinking it's Silver who the man is referring too, Jim later asked him for details. The man told Jim that, near the coast Maratoran, Silver left the ship they were on went to the island on a small boat. Jim, who couldn't go at the time, left for Maratoran six years later. He met Silver's wife and son there.

title: The Restaurant of Many Orders
titleNative: 注文の多い料理店
synopsis: The oldest anime adaptation of a famous short story by Japanese writer Kenji Miyazawa. Two young British hunters get lost in the woods and discover a strange restaurant.

title: Ushiro no Hyakutarou
titleNative: 心霊恐怖レポート うしろの百太郎
synopsis: Horror OVA based on the manga by Jirou Tsunoda. The title roughly means "Hyakutarou behind". A boy named Ichitarou Ushiro deals with various horrifying phenomena with the help of his guardian spirit Hyakutarou. 2 episodes: "Kokkuri Satsujin Jiken", "Yuutai Ridatsu". (Source: AniDB)

title: Youkai Watch ♪: Jibanyan VS Komasan Monge Daikessen da Nyan
titleRomaji: Youkai Watch ♪: Jibanyan VS Komasan Monge Daikessen da Nyan
titleNative: 妖怪ウォッチ♪ ジバニャンVSコマさん もんげー大決戦だニャン
synonyms: Yo-kai Watch ♪ Jibanyan vs. Komasan: Great Final Battle Meow
synopsis: The story begins when Jibanyan's favorite sweets store Chocobo and Komasan's favorite soft serve ice cream parlor suddenly vanish from the town due to the actions of a mysterious yo-kai creature. The yo-kai says that Jibanyan and Komasan must face off to determine which of the two shops will return. (Source: Anime News Network, edited)

title: Exorcism Chronicles: The Beginning
titleNative: 퇴마록
synopsis: Hyeon-Am trains in Tai Chi Qigong in order to fight the water ghost that killed his sister; Father Park, unable to save his friend's daughter from an unknown evil spirit, chooses to become a priest walking the path of asceticism; Jun-Hu, the only survivor of Eastern Sea Esoteric Buddhism, is a genius who has inherited all the magic of the five guardians of Esoteric Buddhism; Seung-Hui, who has a secret, gets involved in a mysterious case due to her father. An occult fantasy in which individual exorcists, each driven by their own causes, solve crimes and fight together against evil demons—demons who rule the spiritual and emotional worlds of mankind, and drive society into chaos. (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Dororonpa!
titleNative: どろろんぱっ！
synopsis: Komachi is a little ghost who died during the Meiji Era and has hung around earth as a wandering spirit girl for over a hundred years. Komachi appears in the room of a young girl named Anko and the two get wrapped up in all sorts of adventures involving other ghosts and demons. (Source: TV Asahi)

title: Tenjin
titleNative: 天神
synopsis: A young girl named Miru and Ran, a boy who appeared before Miru, embark on an adventure in an alternate world—but something tragic awaits them there... (Source: Anime News Network) Note: One of the four short movies created for the Young Animator Training Project Anime no Tane 2022.

tags.name: No Dialogue

tags.name: CGI

title: Soul Reviver
titleNative: ソウルリヴァイヴァー
synopsis: 3D CG promotional video for the Soul Reviver manga by Fujisawa Tohru. In the manga, the dead can be brough back to life, if their souls can be restored before disappearing into the void. Between death and the void is the world of the dead, and two individuals - the former detective Jin Ryuusuke and the dead high school girl Sekimachi Kurara - salvage souls in this realm. (Source: Anime News Network)

tags.name: Seinen
tags.description: Target demographic is adult males.

title: Neo Faust
titleNative: ネオ・ファウスト
synopsis: Tezuka Osamu planned to make an animated version, but the project was always called off. This work was to make his dream come true at last, but he was unfortunately struck by an illness and died when he was working on the synopsis. This was one of his unfinished works. It was aired during NHK's "Tezuka Osamu, Seikimatsu e no Message" (手塚治虫・世紀末へのメッセージ) program. (Source: AniDB)

title: Warau Salesman Tokubetsu Bangumi
titleNative: 笑ゥせぇるすまん 特別番組
synopsis: A special program of Warau Salesman, these episodes were released in a blast format on 3 days in a nearly 2 hour long timeslot each. The individual episodes have their own OPs. The first blast release differed from the main series by having live-action footage of real locations in Japan before delving into the story for each episode. The 2nd had Moguro with the Master interacting with the viewer as if behind the scenes for a studio before delving into each episode. And the 3rd had Moguro and the Master playing outside in the snow as if reporting on an on-location event to the viewer before delving into each episode.

title: Bureau of Paranormal Investigation Season 2
titleNative: 民调局异闻录 第2季
synonyms: Bai Fa Shen La (白发沈辣)
synopsis: Shen La, a special investigator of the "Poll Bureau" of the mysterious incident management agency, was seriously injured in the execution of his mission. When he was about to die, he accepted the inheritance of Wu Rendi, the director of the Sixth Office - a "seed" containing mysterious power. After regaining consciousness, Wu Rendi's senior brother Guangren accepted him as his disciple. In order to find the fragments of the Tianli Diagram, Shen La, after going through the Tianshan Wolf Tomb, energy backlash, foundation conspiracy and other incidents, was finally recognized by Wu Rendi and received the ancient artifact-the Twin Swords of Crime and Punishment given by him. At the same time, the problem of the insider in the polling bureau became more complicated and confusing, and Shen La and her partner Sun Desheng went into battle again. (Source: Bilibili, translated)
